title: Permits and Diplomas
description: This mod adds permits to your game which can be claimed by players to keep track of who produces what.
body:
![The Title of the modpack along with a few renders of items it adds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78f9e5acc8a9a5e1e53e105e65ad71e8ef5be625.png)

# Permits and Diplomas
Have you ever wanted to manage who gets to produce and sell which items on your server?
Then look no further!

Permits and Diplomas (Diplomas are still WIP) provides an easy way to do just that.
It offers a simple List where players can look at who is allowed to do what and who is already done with their stuff.

Draw a random Permit from an unopened letter, claim it and get to work.
And if you decide that you dont want it anymore, just unclaim it with [Shift] + [RMB].

## Content
**All Items can only be obtained via the creative Menu!**
- Permits -> The main content of this Mod. You can open Permit Envelopes of different Tiers to draw from a Pool of Titles from the config. The associated items with this Title can also be changed there.
- Permit Editor Item -> A simple creative Tool which lets you edit the Title and Content of a Permit in your offhand. Does **not** change the contents of the config
- Data Delete Item -> This item lets you reset all the permit data in this save (not the other ones) in case anything goes wrong.

- The survival Inventory has gotten a new Permit-Button. This window lets you see all the Permits, who they belong to and which ones are finished. You can also look at which items belong to which permit.

**This mod does not keep track of item-counts! It is based on trust alone**

## Future Plans
- Diplomas -> Simple Items which display a custom text to a person
- Contracts -> A more complex Item which lets players write a Contract that both parties can sign. Once signed it will be sealed and cannot be changed. Like a book and quill, but with two signatures.

## FAQ
- Where do I install this mod? - This mod needs to be on both Client- and Server Side!
- Does it work with other mods? - Yes! The config is just based on text and accepts every kind of item. If it cannot find your item it will simply skip it. Just make sure you get the correct Item-ID
